overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban downtown with elevated infrastructure, construction barriers, and pedestrians. The scene transitions from a covered sidewalk to streets beneath elevated train tracks, following an NCPD officer, and ending with the character running toward an emergency incident scene.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to red and white construction barriers

entered.detail: tall construction barriers with red and white horizontal stripes
black metal security fence running along the construction zone
tall palm tree visible ahead along the sidewalk
elevated pedestrian walkway structure spanning across the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered urban sidewalk bordered by red and white construction barriers and black metal fencing. Palm trees and an elevated walkway are visible in the distance as pedestrians walk toward the camera.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with food vendors and shops

events.description: turns left at street corner into open area with street vendors on the left

agents.ego_description: turning left at the corner and continuing along the new street section

entered.detail: food vendor stall with red counters and display cases
row of parked vehicles along the right side of the street

segments.scene_description: After turning left at the corner, the scene opens to a busier street with food vendors lining the left sidewalk and parked cars on the right. The construction barriers fall behind as pedestrians move in various directions.

events.description: enters covered area beneath large green elevated train track structure

agents.ego_description: walking straight beneath the elevated infrastructure

entered.detail: massive green steel elevated train track structure running overhead
orange construction scaffolding against the building facade
modern concrete building with large glass windows

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive green elevated train track that dominates the sky above. Orange scaffolding and modern concrete buildings line the left side while the street opens up ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open street with police presence and parked vehicles

events.description: begins following an NCPD officer walking ahead on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: following the NCPD officer while walking past rows of parked cars

notable_agents.action: NCPD officer in uniform walking ahead of the player character

entered.detail: large concrete support pillars for the elevated structure
traffic signal pole at the intersection ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking along a wider street section, the camera follows an NCPD officer past concrete support pillars and rows of parked cars. The elevated train track remains visible overhead as the street opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: incident scene with emergency vehicles and barricades

events.description: character breaks into a sprint and takes cover behind a large concrete pillar
approaches emergency scene with burning vehicle and construction barricades

agents.ego_description: running forward and taking cover behind a pillar, approaching an incident scene

entered.detail: emergency vehicle with visible fire and smoke at the incident scene
massive concrete pillar used for cover
orange and white construction barricades blocking the street

segments.scene_description: The character sprints forward and takes cover behind a large concrete pillar, approaching an emergency incident scene with a burning vehicle and construction barricades blocking the road ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a futuristic urban district that transitions from a restricted sidewalk into a chaotic emergency scene. It begins along a covered walkway bordered by red and white construction barriers and black metal fencing, moving past pedestrians toward distant palm trees. As the camera turns a corner, the scene opens into a busier street lined with food vendors and parked cars, before shifting beneath the massive shadow of a green elevated train track and orange scaffolding. The perspective then follows an NCPD officer past concrete support pillars and rows of vehicles as the street widens. Finally, the character sprints forward to take cover behind a large concrete pillar, arriving at a road blocked by barricades and a burning vehicle.
